signal_watch.title: Optimized CDN caching and deploying of immutable static assets
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Vercel now reuses static files across deployments for frameworks that output content-addressed assets. It's zero-config: Vercel uses Framework-defined infrastructure to manage these immutable files alongside your code changes, handling the hard parts like hash collisions, file lifecycles, and efficient routing. This brings several benefits: Lower costs and improved cache hit rates — For frameworks using query-parameter-based Skew Protection (such as Next.js), we saw 17% fewer
signal_watch.excerpt: Vercel now reuses static files across deployments for frameworks that output content-addressed assets. It's zero-config: Vercel uses Framework-defined infrastructure to manage these immutable files alongside your code changes, handling the hard parts like hash collisions, file lifecycles, and efficient routing. This brings several benefits: Lower costs and improved cache hit rates — For frameworks using query-parameter-based Skew Protection (such as Next.js), we saw 17% fewer

signal_watch.title: Chat SDK adds native Slack agent support
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: Chat SDK's Slack adapter now supports the agent messaging experience Slack introduced on June 30 . Agents built with Chat SDK could already talk in channels and DMs and stream replies token-by-token. This update adds the Agent badge, agent conversations in the Messages tab, suggested prompts, rotating status messages, and native feedback buttons. Here's what the adapter gives you: Suggested prompts, per thread: Pass a static payload or an async resolver that receives the thre

signal_watch.title: GLM 5.2 is 35% off via Novita on AI Gateway
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: GLM 5.2 is 35% off on AI Gateway through July 24 when routed through Novita. To get the discounted rate, set the model to zai/glm-5.2 in the AI SDK and route requests through Novita: After July 24, the model stays available at standard provider rates with no markup. Try GLM 5.2 in the model playground . Read more

signal_watch.title: Vercel Plugin now available in Kimi Code CLI
signal_watch.author: Vercel AI
signal_watch.summary: The Vercel Plugin is now available in the Kimi Code CLI . Kimi Code can now draw on Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel Plugin also helps Kimi Code stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it, upgrade to the latest Kimi Code CLI and select the Vercel Plugin from the Third-party section of the /plugin menu. Learn more in the Vercel Plugin documentation . Read more
signal_watch.excerpt: The Vercel Plugin is now available in the Kimi Code CLI . Kimi Code can now draw on Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel Plugin also helps Kimi Code stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it, upgrade to the latest Kimi Code CLI and select the Vercel Plugin from the Third-party section of the /plugin menu. Learn more in the Vercel Plugin documentation . Read more

clusters.title: The cost of saying yes has changed
clusters.summary: The cost of writing code dropped; the cost of owning it didn't. A framework for deciding which changes are actually cheap in the AI era. The post The cost of saying yes has changed appeared first on The GitHub Blog .

clusters.title: A scorecard for the AI age
clusters.summary: Sarah Friar, CFO of OpenAI, introduces a practical AI scorecard to measure ROI through useful work, cost per successful task, dependability, and return on compute.

clusters.title: Q&A: How Capcom Brought Path Tracing to RE ENGINE Across PRAGMATA and Resident Evil Requiem

clusters.title: Optimized CDN caching and deploying of immutable static assets
clusters.summary: Vercel now reuses static files across deployments for frameworks that output content-addressed assets. It's zero-config: Vercel uses Framework-defined infrastructure to manage these immutable files alongside your code changes, handling the hard parts like hash collisions, file lifecycles, and efficient routing. This brings several benefits: Lower costs and improved cache hit rates — For frameworks using query-parameter-based Skew Protection (such as Next.js), we saw 17% fewer

clusters.title: Chat SDK adds native Slack agent support
clusters.summary: Chat SDK's Slack adapter now supports the agent messaging experience Slack introduced on June 30 . Agents built with Chat SDK could already talk in channels and DMs and stream replies token-by-token. This update adds the Agent badge, agent conversations in the Messages tab, suggested prompts, rotating status messages, and native feedback buttons. Here's what the adapter gives you: Suggested prompts, per thread: Pass a static payload or an async resolver that receives the thre

clusters.title: GLM 5.2 is 35% off via Novita on AI Gateway
clusters.summary: GLM 5.2 is 35% off on AI Gateway through July 24 when routed through Novita. To get the discounted rate, set the model to zai/glm-5.2 in the AI SDK and route requests through Novita: After July 24, the model stays available at standard provider rates with no markup. Try GLM 5.2 in the model playground . Read more

clusters.title: Vercel Plugin now available in Kimi Code CLI
clusters.summary: The Vercel Plugin is now available in the Kimi Code CLI . Kimi Code can now draw on Vercel platform knowledge on demand, with skills for Next.js, AI SDK, Vercel Functions, and more. The Vercel Plugin also helps Kimi Code stay up to date with the latest Vercel APIs and recommended patterns. To install it, upgrade to the latest Kimi Code CLI and select the Vercel Plugin from the Third-party section of the /plugin menu. Learn more in the Vercel Plugin documentation . Read more
